allow: Bash(node --experimental-strip-types -e "import\('./app/api/chat/prompts/tea-echo.ts'\).then\(m => { const s = m.TEA_SYSTEM_ECHO; console.log\('총 길이:', s.length\); console.log\('4단계 응답 구조 포함?:', s.includes\('## ECHO 4단계 응답 구조'\)\); console.log\('2단계 응답 구조 포함?:', s.includes\('## ⚠️ ECHO 2단계 응답 구조'\)\); console.log\('우선순위 배너 포함?:', s.includes\('🔥 적용 우선순위'\)\); console.log\('비활성 마커 텍스트 포함?:', s.includes\('⛔ 비활성 끝'\)\); }\)")

Bash(awk 'NR==1812{count=1; next} count>0 {if \(/^[[:space:]]*\\{/\) count++; if \(/^[[:space:]]*\\}/\) count--; if \(count==0\) {print "if\(false\) close at line", NR; exit}}' "app/api/chat/route.ts")

PowerShell($body = @{ messages = @\(@{ role = 'user'; content = '삼성전자 지금 사도 될까요?' }\); isAdvancedQuestion = $true } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 -Compress; $bytes = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\($body\); $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://20260331-persona-x.vercel.app/api/chat' -Method POST -ContentType 'application/json; charset=utf-8' -Body $bytes; "STATUS=$\($resp.StatusCode\) CT=$\($resp.Headers.'Content-Type'\)"; \($resp.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(800, $resp.Content.Length\)\)\))

PowerShell($body = @{ messages = @\(@{ role = 'user'; content = '아들이 대학 합격했어요!' }\) } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 -Compress; $bytes = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\($body\); $sw = [System.Diagnostics.Stopwatch]::StartNew\(\); try { $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://20260331-persona-x.vercel.app/api/chat' -Method POST -ContentType 'application/json; charset=utf-8' -Body $bytes -TimeoutSec 120; $sw.Stop\(\); "ELAPSED=$\($sw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds\)s STATUS=$\($resp.StatusCode\) CT=$\($resp.Headers.'Content-Type'\) LEN=$\($resp.Content.Length\)" } catch { $sw.Stop\(\); "ELAPSED=$\($sw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds\)s ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($body = @{ messages = @\(@{ role = 'user'; content = '아들이 대학 합격했어요!' }\) } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 -Compress; $bytes = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\($body\); $sw = [System.Diagnostics.Stopwatch]::StartNew\(\); $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://20260331-persona-x.vercel.app/api/chat' -Method POST -ContentType 'application/json; charset=utf-8' -Body $bytes -TimeoutSec 120; $sw.Stop\(\); "ELAPSED=$\($sw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds\)s STATUS=$\($resp.StatusCode\) CT=$\($resp.Headers.'Content-Type'\) LEN=$\($resp.Content.Length\)")

PowerShell($body = @{ messages = @\(@{ role = 'user'; content = '회사 다니기 너무 힘들어요' }\) } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 -Compress; $bytes = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\($body\); $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://20260331-persona-x.vercel.app/api/chat' -Method POST -ContentType 'application/json; charset=utf-8' -Body $bytes -TimeoutSec 60; $lines = $resp.Content -split "`n"; foreach \($line in $lines\) { if \($line.Trim\(\) -ne ''\) { try { $j = $line | ConvertFrom-Json; if \($j.type -eq 'done'\) { "ECHO: [$\($j.personas.echo\)]"; "LUCIA: [$\($j.personas.lucia\)]"; "LUCIA_CLOSE: [$\($j.personas.lucia_close\)]" } } catch {} } })

PowerShell($body = @{ messages = @\(@{ role = 'user'; content = '회사 다니기 너무 힘들어요' }\) } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 -Compress; $bytes = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\($body\); $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://20260331-persona-x.vercel.app/api/chat' -Method POST -ContentType 'application/json; charset=utf-8' -Body $bytes -TimeoutSec 60; "LEN=$\($resp.Content.Length\)"; $lines = $resp.Content -split "`n"; "LINES=$\($lines.Count\)"; $doneLine = $lines | Where-Object { $_ -match '"type":"done"' } | Select-Object -First 1; if \($doneLine\) { $doneLine.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(2000, $doneLine.Length\)\) } else { "no done line; last line: $\($lines[-2]\)" })

PowerShell($body = @{ messages = @\(@{ role = 'user'; content = 'ping' }\) } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 -Compress; $bytes = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\($body\); $sw = [System.Diagnostics.Stopwatch]::StartNew\(\); try { $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://20260331-persona-x.vercel.app/api/chat' -Method POST -ContentType 'application/json; charset=utf-8' -Body $bytes -TimeoutSec 30; $sw.Stop\(\); "ELAPSED=$\($sw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds\)s STATUS=$\($resp.StatusCode\)" } catch { $sw.Stop\(\); "ELAPSED=$\($sw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds\)s ERROR" })

PowerShell($body = @{ messages = @\(@{ role = 'user'; content = '남편이랑 사이가 안 좋아요' }\) } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 -Compress; $bytes = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\($body\); $sw = [System.Diagnostics.Stopwatch]::StartNew\(\); try { $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://20260331-persona-x.vercel.app/api/chat' -Method POST -ContentType 'application/json; charset=utf-8' -Body $bytes -TimeoutSec 60; $sw.Stop\(\); "ELAPSED=$\($sw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds\)s STATUS=$\($resp.StatusCode\) CT=$\($resp.Headers.'Content-Type'\) LEN=$\($resp.Content.Length\)" } catch { $sw.Stop\(\); "ELAPSED=$\($sw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds\)s ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
Bash(awk '/^  - description: "invest 부동산 — 부동산 지금 사도 될까요\\?"/{found=1} found' promptfoo.yaml)
PowerShell(npx promptfoo eval -c promptfoo.yaml --no-cache --output results-new.json 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 15)
